purpose: Commit pending writes so engagement-view side sees them. Without this, writes are DISCARDED on reload.
notes: PER-WORKPAPER ONLY. Empty workpaperId ('submit ALL pending in binder' — the UI's 'Submit All KC Changes' button) silently DISCARDS pending writes on other forms instead of committing them (isolated-test confirmed 2026-07-08). Even scoped correctly, KC drops ~30-50% of write->submit pairs — mandatory loop: write -> settle ~1.2s -> submit -> verify by re-read after reload -> retry misses (cap ~3). See field-conventions.md section 5 item 3a.
